home.heroSubtitle: Bags, accessories and stands — handmade in Lomé, Togo
home.storyText: Each piece is handmade with love and patience, continuing an ancestral Togolese craft tradition.

savoirFaire.title: Our craft
savoirFaire.subtitle: The art of Togolese beadwork
savoirFaire.intro: Each creation is the result of hours of meticulous work, entirely handmade in my workshop in Lomé.

steps.selection: Bead selection — Each bead is chosen for its color, size, and quality
steps.design: Pattern design — Inspired by traditional kente patterns and Togolese nature
steps.assembly: Assembly — Bead by bead, the pattern takes shape with patience and precision
steps.finishing: Finishing — Every detail is checked for impeccable quality

contact.title: Contact

whatsapp.fallbackMessage: Hello! I'm interested in your creations. Can you tell me more?
